title: Time Space Rebuild
description:
If tomorrow were doomsday, would you save the world or spend your last moments with a loved one?

Childhood Sweetheart :

"I’ll stay with you, now and forever."

The Bold and Decisive Sexy Spy:

"Faith, mission, emotions? They’re illusions. Only control ensures survival."

Mysterious genius girl:

"You’re the only light in my life and the connection to this world."

Gentle Intellectual Maid:

"Cry if you need to. I’m here."

Innocent noble girl:

"Take me with you. Let’s run away together!"

 If you’re into dangerous and beautiful bad girls, we’ve got that too...

"Let's just stay in this moment, and after tonight, forget me."

Endless Exploration:Hundreds endings. Every choice shapes the story, making each player’s journey unique with hidden content to discover.

New Adventure:A fictional world offers endless possibilities. Experience epic romance and thrilling adventure, crafting your own epic tale.

Diverse Gameplay:Rich interactive content—exploration, combat, and collection—delivers ultimate satisfaction and immersion. The adventure never ends.

Ultimate Visuals:Five distinct heroines—cool, elegant, charming, romantic, and seductive—accompany you across different eras and cultures.
description_short: In "Time Rebuild", human civilization stands on the brink of destruction. You will become a time-traveling hero, embarking on a journey to save the world while encountering and bonding with women of vastly different appearances and personalities.
